acts.name: Echoes of the Fallen Star
acts.summary: Kael and Lyra discover ARIEL in the crash site outside Crestfall and learn of the Stellar Archive — the last hope against the Bane.

acts.name: The Void Between Worlds
acts.summary: The party seeks a ship to cross the void to Motavia, navigating dangers of the dying planet.

acts.name: Light of the Archive
acts.summary: Deep in Motavia's ruins, the party uncovers the truth about the Bane — and the terrible price of stopping it.
